vision_verdict: pass. This is a fully functional-looking dashboard interface. The layout is intact and contains extensive UI elements: a sidebar with navigation links (Admin Panel, Users, Curriculum Studio, Knowledge Library, etc.), a user profile section with token tracking, a theme toggle, a sign-out button, and a central "Interactive Knowledge Library" content area. The presence of a context-aware onboarding tooltip ("Welcome to Fahem Sandbox!"), a role-based navigation bar, and clear, distinct sections for curriculum and private files indicates a populated, interactive application rather than a static or broken page.
